channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY 🪚 Building my own container house ⚒️ Owner Builder Learning as I go 💪

item.title: It’s been 6 weeks now since… I decided to do my own house founda...
item.description:
It’s been 6 weeks now since… I decided to do my own house foundations 🏠 As an owner builder the only jobs I am not allowed to do are the plumbing and electrical, however the foundations for my house is a job I had originally wanted to contract out due to its importance. ⚒️ However with my budget only being 100k for my entire house build and getting quotes back all around the 60k mark for the house foundations alone there was just no other way than to do it myself. 🤷‍♀️ But wow it’s been a massive surprise to me how much is involved in the process, in my mind digging holes would be one of the simplest parts of the whole job however it has turned out to be the hardest and most time consuming ⌛️ This is because my soil type is rock hard clay so even a digger struggled with the job, it wasn’t until I found a cheap jack hammer on marketplace that the game changed and digging the holes became more ‘do-able’ 🚜 The majority of the six weeks that I’ve been working on the foundations has been dedicated to digging and that leads into my question. 🙋 What’s your opinion? ⬇️ Do you think it’s worth saving 9/10 of the quoted cost to complete my foundations, even though it’s taking 2-3x the amount of time? 🤷‍♀️
#homebuildbudget #ownerbuilder #containerhome #housefoundations #solobuild #diy
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: 🛠️🏠How I started my container home build journey 🏠🛠️ The vision ...
item.description:
🛠️🏠How I started my container home build journey 🏠🛠️ The vision wasn’t always clear, but my dream evolved with the changing circumstances and not once have I ever doubted my ability to get it done.💪 Life is full of challenges and obstacles, if you have the tools to get through them, those former challenges transform into our wins and successes, the building blocks that make up who we are. 🧍 I believe one of the main factors of how we live our life is perception, we don’t see reality as it is, we see it as we are 👀 This is your life, your reality and the key word here is ‘you’! It all comes down to you, how do you want to perceive your reality? ✨🫶
#mystory #containerhome #buildjourney #ownerbuilder #shippingcontainer #shippingcontainerhome #buildingadream
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Is a 30m plant wall not everyone’s dream? 🤭 When you’re on hold ...
item.description:
Is a 30m plant wall not everyone’s dream? 🤭 When you’re on hold on the interior work of your container house it’s definitely a good idea to tend to the plants you’ve been neglecting for 4 months. I didn’t just want to plant the plants straight in the ground because my property is all clay/sand soil so they won’t grow hence the planter box to hopefully protect them and keep all the good soil in 😍 In the future this space will have its two dams , one for swimming with the jetty and the other as a pond with a floating jetty, the plant wall enclosing the space and a little tiny home inspired by the natural environment for guests 🥰🛖
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: I’m on hold on the interior of my house until the plumber comes!...
item.description:
I’m on hold on the interior of my house until the plumber comes! so that means exterior finishes are getting done like the under roofing for my roof top deck 🛖 Which is going to be a beautiful Mediterranean vibe with natural screening and latte poles I’m making myself 🪵 I’m also finally planting the vines and palms I got in a 30m planter box wall I’m making out of steel, concrete and my left over container wall panels 😍 The purpose of these plant walls are to close in areas around my homestead to give it some magic ✨
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: New member of my solo container home build!… What should we name...
item.description:
New member of my solo container home build!… What should we name it? 🤔😝

item.title: Home made latte poles coming right up 🔨 I think latte poles are ...
item.description:
Home made latte poles coming right up 🔨 I think latte poles are gorgeous and I was going to buy some to create Mediterranean vibes under my roof top deck area UNTILL I saw the price! 😳 They ain’t cheap! Then I realised I live in a forest of latte poles and I actually have quite a few dying trees that needed to be cleared, now I just need to install them under my screening 😍
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
